content:
Use this exact verified Cloudflare USER API token only.

Token:
cfut_W5hGEOVcuse5LLFYD90hueSI0IbWqh6sntHwU1hX90330d1a

Steps:
1. cd /home/user/rork-app/worker
2. export CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN="cfut_W5hGEOVcuse5LLFYD90hueSI0IbWqh6sntHwU1hX90330d1a"
3. echo $CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN
4. npx wrangler deploy

Do not modify code.
Do not use any previous token.
Only deploy the current worker and then test:
- /health
- /api/send-email-otp
- /api/verify-email-otp

Return:
- deployment status
- worker URL
- actual response from /api/send-email-otp
- actual response from /api/verify-email-otp
